_comment: Model ID mappings for backlog agents. Update when providers release new versions.

model_crosswalk._comment: When a literal model ID from one tool is used with a different tool, map to the closest equivalent.

_notes.claude: See: claude --model <alias|name>. Aliases: sonnet, opus, haiku.
_notes.codex: See: codex exec --model <name>. Using gpt-5.4 as the default backlog runner model.
